item.title: Perplexity AI Shopping Bots Can Stay on Amazon for Now, Court Rules
item.description: Perplexity AI Inc. won a reprieve from a court order that would have banned its Comet shopping bots from Amazon.com Inc. this week.

item.title: Sri Lanka Growth Slows on Cyclone; Outlook Clouded by Conflict
item.description: Sri Lanka’s economic growth slowed in the fourth quarter due to the impact of Cyclone Ditwah, while the near-term outlook remains clouded by the Iran war.

item.title: Tencent Seizes Momentum in China Agentic AI Race Against Alibaba
item.description: In China’s hyper-competitive AI arena, Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. has outpaced Tencent Holdings Ltd. with the sheer speed of rollouts and user growth. But the latter firm is now seizing the initiative as agentic AI fever grips the country.

item.title: Pentagon Moving to Replace Anthropic Amid AI Feud, Official Says
item.description: The Pentagon is working to develop alternatives to Anthropic PBC’s artificial intelligence tools, according to a senior US defense official, following a Trump administration decision to declare the company a supply-chain risk in a feud over safeguards governing military use of the technology.

item.title: 道明银行称，罗杰斯或将出售其持有的这家市值180亿美元体育巨头的股份以削减债务
item.description: Rogers Communications Inc. could sell off almost one-third of a C$25 billion ($18 billion) Canadian sports empire to pay down debt this year, according to analysts at TD Securities.

item.title: Asian Refiners Scour the World for Oil With Hormuz Flows Halted
item.description: Asia’s oil refiners are ramping up crude purchases from outside the Middle East, the latest sign of a scramble to secure supplies as shipping through the vital Strait of Hormuz remains all-but halted.

item.title: Bank of Canada Likely to Stay on Hold as Oil Scrambles the Outlook
item.description: The Bank of Canada is likely to hold interest rates steady as policymakers weigh the inflation risk of higher oil prices against a string of weak economic numbers.

item.title: IBM CEO Sees More AI Deals in ‘Friendlier’ Regulatory Climate
item.description: International Business Machines Corp. Chief Executive Officer Arvind Krishna expects the company to pursue more deals in AI, helped by less regulatory pushback.

item.title: Greece Pushes LNG Hub Role in Europe’s Post-Russian Gas Era
item.description: Greece is positioning itself as a key gas hub for central and southeastern Europe as the continent moves toward a full phaseout of Russian energy, Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis said.

item.title: 随着油价波动打乱利率预期，巴西加大了债券市场干预力度
item.description: Brazil’s Treasury intervened in the local bond market for a second straight day, announcing fresh auctions to both buy back and sell government debt to support liquidity and stabilize trading as the surge in crude prices ripples through global markets.

item.title: Microsoft Combines Workplace, Personal Copilot Teams in AI Push
item.description: Microsoft Corp. is uniting the teams that build versions of its Copilot for individuals and corporations, streamlining product development as the company works to get its AI assistant into the hands of more customers.

item.title: UK Funds Snap Up Gilts in Bet That Markets Have BOE All Wrong
item.description: Two of Britain’s biggest asset managers are buying UK government bonds, convinced the market has misjudged how the Bank of England will respond to the war in the Middle East.

item.title: Reeves Floats Plan to Give UK Regions Say Over Income Tax Funds
item.description: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves said she is drawing up plans to give regional leaders in the UK control of some national tax revenues, as part of her push to raise economic growth across Britain.

item.title: North Sea Oil Tycoon Faces Asset Freeze Over Iran Plant Dealings
item.description: Francesco Mazzagatti, an energy trader who has become a key figure in the North Sea industry, is facing a worldwide asset freeze over allegations he siphoned off funds from former business partners in Iran.

item.title: 为何油价上涨使美联储的平衡之举变得更加复杂
item.description: When the US Federal Reserve sets interest rates, the process typically involves striking a balance between two goals, price stability and full employment. A sharp increase in energy prices as a result of the Iran war and a rise in the unemployment rate in February risks putting those two goals into conflict. That’s likely to prompt Fed officials to hold interest rates steady at their March 17-18 meeting, though the changes in economic conditions could drive more divisions over which of the two p

item.title: Beats 与 Nike 联手推出限量版无线耳机
item.description: 苹果公司旗下的Beats与耐克公司联合宣布推出一款限量版Powerbeats Pro 2耳机，该产品采用了这家运动品牌标志性的“勾”形标志，这标志着Beats首次与外部公司进行硬件联名合作。【原文：Apple Inc.’s Beats subsidiary and Nike Inc. announced a limited-edition version of the Powerbeats Pro 2 earbuds featuring the sportswear company’s iconic swoosh logo, marking the first time Beats has co-branded its hardware with an outside company.】

item.title: US Economy’s Strength Hinges on How Much the Rich Spend
item.description: Just how K-shaped is the US consumer?

item.title: US Pending Home Sales Climbed in February as Mortgage Rates Fell
item.description: Pending sales of US existing homes unexpectedly rose in February for the first time in three months as buyers took advantage of lower mortgage rates and slower price growth.

item.title: 在减肥药价格进一步下调之前，汇丰给予礼来“卖出”评级
item.description: 汇丰银行一年内第二次下调礼来公司股票评级，称投资者对减肥药的预期过于乐观，受此影响，礼来公司股价出现下跌。【原文：Eli Lilly & Co. shares dip after HSBC turned bearish on the stock, for the second time in a year, saying investor expectations for weight-loss drugs are over inflated.】

item.title: 伊朗在与抗议活动相关的节日来临前收紧了互联网管控
item.description: 据网络监测机构和当地活动人士称，自战争爆发以来，伊朗的互联网一直受到政权的严重限制，而在过去48小时内，网络状况变得更加严峻。【原文：Iran’s internet, which has been heavily throttled by the regime since the outbreak of war, has gone even darker over the past 48 hours, according to network monitoring firms and local activists.】

item.title: 受中东局势持续紧张影响，美国天然气价格随原油价格上涨
item.description: 美国天然气期货随原油价格上涨，而原油价格因市场担忧霍尔木兹海峡的能源供应中断将长期持续而继续攀升。【原文：US natural gas futures rose along with oil, which continues to climb on concerns over a prolonged disruption to energy supplies through the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 雅努斯·亨德森20亿美元杠杆贷款发行加入杠杆收购热潮
item.description: 摩根大通公司正引领华尔街银行界的一股热潮，致力于通过出售高风险贷款来筹集收购资金。最新的一笔交易是规模达20亿美元的债券发行，旨在为尼尔森·佩尔茨旗下的Trian基金管理公司与General Catalyst收购资产管理公司Janus Henderson Group Plc提供资金。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. is leading a push by Wall Street banks to offload risky loans for acquisitions. The latest is a $2 billion debt sale to finance the purchase of asset manager Janus Henderson Group Plc by Nelson Peltz’s Trian Fund Management and General Catalyst.】

item.title: 随着胜利资本提出新报价，Janus的竞购战愈演愈烈
item.description: 随着资产管理行业掀起一波整合浪潮，围绕这家总部位于伦敦的投资公司Janus Henderson Group Plc的竞购战愈演愈烈，Victory Capital Holdings已提交了一份新的收购要约。【原文：Victory Capital Holdings submitted a fresh offer for Janus Henderson Group Plc, as the bidding war for the London-based investment firm intensifies amid a wave of consolidation among asset managers.】

item.title: 高通将回购200亿美元股票，并提高股息
item.description: 全球最大的智能手机处理器制造商高通公司计划再回购价值200亿美元的股票，并提高季度现金股息。【原文：Qualcomm Inc., the largest maker of smartphone processors, plans to buy back another $20 billion worth of shares and is raising its quarterly cash dividend.】

item.title: 伊朗战争期间，阿曼确保中东地区液化天然气供应持续微弱
item.description: 据知情人士透露，阿曼液化天然气公司正计划出售一船液化天然气，目的地为亚洲。这表明，尽管伊朗局势动荡，中东地区的天然气供应仍在持续。【原文：Oman LNG is offering to sell a cargo of liquefied natural gas to be delivered to Asia, according to people with knowledge of the matter, signaling a trickle of the fuel continues to flow from the Middle East despite the Iran war.】

item.title: 大宗商品货币套利交易因油价上涨创下数年来的最佳回报
item.description: 在日均交易额达9.5万亿美元的外汇市场上，一种最常用的策略正因油价飙升而获得提振，而油价上涨正令其他全球资产市场动荡不安。【原文：One of the most widely used strategies in the $9.5 trillion-per-day currency market is getting a boost from the surge in oil prices that’s roiling other global assets.】

item.title: 墨西哥620亿美元的美国汇款正逐渐摆脱现金形式
item.description: 2011年，莫拉·丰塞卡从墨西哥搬到休斯顿后，经常要在西联汇款的柜台前排队等候数小时，只为给她的三个孩子和母亲汇款。手续费高得离谱，有时她甚至不得不借钱来支付。【原文：After Maura Fonseca moved to Houston from Mexico in 2011, she often waited hours in line at Western Union to send money to her three children and her mother. The fees were so steep she sometimes had to borrow money to pay them.】

item.title: 曾预言Goeasy股价暴跌的做空者称赞其“坦白从宽”的时刻
item.description: 加拿大次级贷款机构Goeasy Ltd.上周披露了数亿美元的贷款损失，导致其股价暴跌。对于维克多·博尼利亚而言，他早在9月就曾警告过该公司融资业务相关的风险，此刻正是他庆祝胜利的时刻。【原文：Canadian subprime lender Goeasy Ltd. disclosed hundreds of millions of dollars in loan losses last week, sending its stock plunging. For Victor Bonilla, who had warned about the risks tied to the company’s financing business in September, it was time for a victory lap.】

item.title: 遭无人机袭击的俄罗斯化肥厂将停产至5月
item.description: 俄罗斯当局表示，一家大型氮肥厂在上月遭到乌克兰无人机袭击后，将停产至5月，这预示着在中东冲突扰乱全球贸易的背景下，供应将面临进一步压力。【原文：Russian authorities said a major nitrogen fertilizer plant will remain idle until May after a Ukrainian drone strike last month, signaling further strain on supplies as the Middle East conflict disrupts global trade.】

item.title: 奥迪以“纯粹的愤怒”猛烈抨击了OAM对冲基金的高管
item.description: 一位资深基金经理称，克里斯平·奥迪（Crispin Odey）在其伦敦家中的一次会议上“表现出纯粹的愤怒”，且“脸色”明显大变。目前，性行为不端指控及纪律处分程序正笼罩着奥迪资产管理公司（Odey Asset Management）的创始人。【原文：Crispin Odey “exhibited pure rage,” and visibly changed “color” during a meeting at his London home, a senior fund manager has alleged, as sexual misconduct allegations and disciplinary proceedings loomed over the founder of Odey Asset Management.】
